features.name: Agent harness foundation
features.description: Provide a lightweight startup, state, verification, scope, and handoff harness for future agent sessions.
features.evidence: Harness validation scored 100/100. .\init.ps1 passed: npm run build completed 11 static pages and git diff --check passed with LF/CRLF warnings only.

features.name: Portfolio visual system
features.description: Keep the blog aligned with the approved AI developer portfolio direction: image-led sections, Chinese-first copy, consistent card radius, and responsive layouts.
features.evidence: Current redesign work touches homepage, projects, posts, tags, shared components, and generated image assets. 2026-06-15 update refreshed AI 狼人杀 project data, copied the latest ai-werewolf lobby/board WebP assets, added project gallery rendering, and created a Notion-ready technical draft. 2026-06-24 update added AI Daily as a featured Public Preview project with Live Preview and GitHub links, real screenshots, and generic gallery heading support. .\init.ps1 passed with 12 pages including /projects/ai-daily/; git diff --check passed with LF/CRLF warnings only; browser checks passed for /, /projects/, and /projects/ai-daily/ on desktop and 390px mobile with no horizontal overflow or broken loaded images.

features.name: Content and Notion pipeline
features.description: Preserve Astro static build, Notion content loading, post routes, tag routes, sitemap generation, and GitHub Pages compatibility.
features.evidence: README documents Astro + Notion. npm run build is the primary regression gate. 2026-07-02 GitHub Actions failure was traced to transient Notion API Premature close while reading database structure; src/lib/notion.ts now retries Notion requests 5 times with exponential backoff. npm run build and git diff --check passed locally.

features.name: Browser visual verification
features.description: For image-led or layout changes, verify desktop and mobile browser views and record evidence before claiming done.
features.evidence: Recent work used in-app browser metrics for homepage, about, posts, and projects. Continue recording viewport and overflow results in progress.md.

features.name: Deployment readiness
features.description: Keep the site buildable as static output and avoid changes that break GitHub Pages deployment or public asset paths.
features.evidence: astro.config.mjs and package scripts remain the source of truth. Do not change base URL or deployment assumptions without user approval.

features.name: Harness usability layer
features.description: Add user-facing harness entry points: README guidance, reusable task template, and a rendered harness assessment report.
features.evidence: Added README agent workflow entry, docs/agent-task-template.md, and docs/harness-assessment.html. Harness validation remains 100/100. .\init.ps1 passed: npm run build built 11 pages and git diff --check passed with LF/CRLF warnings only.
